chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4970 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.21136/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 05.03.2025 Mr.Arshad Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Abdullah, Advocate for Respondent (K-Electric) Per learned counsel for the petitioner the controversy is covered by the judgment dated 24.08.2023 passed by Division Bench of this Court in C.P.No.D- 7493/2021 and connected matters. The said judgment is binding, therefore, this petition is dismissed mutatis mutandis application of the ratio so illumined, however, subject to right of appeal to the petitioner. Judge Judge nasir
